headline: Victor Munoz — update
body: Liverpool have confirmed the signing of winger Victor Munoz from Osasuna for €40m. Move subject to work permit/international clearance. Six-year contract and he becomes the first signing of Andoni Iraola's reign as head coach. https://t.co/
text:
Liverpool have confirmed the signing of winger Victor Munoz from Osasuna for €40m.  Move subject to work permit/international clearance.
Six-year contract and he becomes the first signing of Andoni Iraola's reign as head coach.

https://t.co/uDtpOVcCDC
